description: Server Node-001 experienced a CPU spike, reaching 95% utilization consistently over the last 10 minutes. This is causing delays in processing user requests.
risk: Prolonged high CPU usage could lead to system crashes and significant service degradation.
resolution: Investigate the processes consuming the CPU and terminate unnecessary ones. Consider scaling resources or optimizing the workloads.

description: Node-123 is reporting 30% packet loss on its network interface, causing connectivity issues with downstream services.
risk: Network disruption could cause significant delays and failures in service delivery, impacting user experience.
resolution: Check the network interface for hardware issues or misconfigurations. Review network routing and consider rerouting traffic if necessary.

description: Storage Node-12 is running out of disk space, with only 5% free storage remaining. This could impact data writes and lead to potential errors.
risk: Insufficient storage could lead to data loss or inability to store new data.
resolution: Free up disk space by deleting unnecessary files or moving data to other nodes. Plan for storage expansion to prevent future bottlenecks.

description: Server Node-045 reports unusually high I/O operations, over 3000 per second, indicating potential disk stress.
risk: Continued high I/O could degrade disk performance and slow down critical operations.
resolution: Analyze the source of high I/O operations and optimize disk-intensive processes. Consider upgrading the disk or implementing caching mechanisms.

description: Load Balancer LB-02 has 2500 active connections, nearing its maximum capacity. This could lead to connection drops if traffic increases further.
risk: Traffic surges could overwhelm the load balancer, leading to service outages.
resolution: Scale the load balancer or distribute traffic among multiple load balancers. Monitor traffic trends to identify peak times.

description: Database Node-DB1 encountered a sudden memory spike, causing the CPU to operate at 85% utilization. Query response times have also increased by 40%.
risk: Prolonged memory and CPU strain could lead to the database becoming unresponsive.
resolution: Optimize queries and redistribute load to secondary databases. Increase memory allocation to prevent future spikes.

description: Node-89 is experiencing moderate CPU utilization at 60% but shows signs of consistent packet loss (10%).
risk: Packet loss could degrade performance and lead to intermittent connectivity issues.
resolution: Analyze network traffic and inspect the physical network connection. Consider increasing network bandwidth or replacing faulty cables.

description: Server Node-077 has disk throughput of only 50 MB/s, much lower than expected for its workload. This is slowing down data processing tasks.
risk: Low disk throughput could lead to increased latency in processing critical tasks.
resolution: Investigate disk health and performance metrics. Consider replacing the disk or using RAID configurations to improve throughput.

description: Compute Node-56 is handling 1800 processes simultaneously, which is causing its CPU load to reach 90%.
risk: Overloading the CPU with too many processes could result in service crashes and degraded performance.
resolution: Reduce the number of concurrent processes by distributing tasks across additional compute nodes. Optimize process scheduling.

description: Node-004 has been idle for over 24 hours despite being part of the active cluster. Resource utilization is below 10% across all metrics.
risk: Idle resources can lead to unnecessary costs in the cloud infrastructure.
resolution: Investigate why the node is idle and reallocate tasks to it. If not needed, consider shutting it down to save costs.
